title: Lebanese and US top generals discuss Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire in 'exceptional' Beirut meeting
snippet: Lebanon's army chief General Rodolphe Haykal met US General Joseph Clearfield at Beirut air base on Saturday. Clearfield leads the committee overseeing the US-backed ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah. The 'exceptional meeting' focused on security, regional developments, and strengthening the ceasefire monitoring mechanism. Both stressed supporting the Lebanese Armed Forces at a critical moment. Meeting came as Israel ordered displacement from 11 southern villages and strikes killed 3 civilians despite ceasefire.
tag_reason: New May 3 meeting — first reported Haykal-Clearfield bilateral on ceasefire monitoring

entities.name: Joseph Clearfield
entities.role: US General, ceasefire monitoring committee head
